name: add_github_actions_ci
avoid: do not commit secrets to YAML
brief_template:
To add GitHub Actions CI:
1. Create .github/workflows/ci.yml
2. Trigger on push and pull_request to main
3. Set up language runtime (go, node, python, rust)
4. Add steps: checkout, deps install, lint, test, build
5. Use secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN or repository secrets for auth
6. Consider adding matrix builds for multiple versions/OS
